name: Team Hunt
subject: Meet Wesley This Week!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

With less than 4 weeks until the March 3rd Primary, time is running out to meet Wesley!

That's why we've added 2 extra opportunities this week to hear Wesley's plan for taking back the 7th District, fighting for our conservative values in Washington and defending our way of life.

First, on Tuesday night, we'll be at Becks Prime in Memorial Park for burgers, beer, wine and live music from 6:00pm-8:00pm.

Email chris@wesleyfortexas.com to RSVP!

Then, on Thursday at 5:30pm, we'll be at the Nottingham Forest Club located at 325 Kickerillo Drive. Food and beverages will be provided and all ages are welcome!

[](http://https://wesleyfortexas.com/nottingham-forest/)
[Click here to RSVP!](http://https://wesleyfortexas.com/nottingham-forest/)

We hope we see you at one of these events! If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact us at info@wesleyfortexas.com or 713-244-6369!

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=1d470cdbd06345f1a3203ff85a091870&_e=LdftgjC93QqP5B2Doto2iFYQVdWV_rOo1iACYwOMwhPWqe3JQFo2ExpEVhqtBV7MEootjbNJzglJQADDa0FT2T1IyxL7bhny6mqiEdvTJHzRsBnhdR1uptpEtm_V8f8crmp_HNcCmvarCpmVduncqi1VdhVMUdOIJ0MIr_HvYL9D4empULlIDPgPn97C7BR67T1StKlqf4XBPCMP72aKsMxolKRM6vXY2qNojWOTfJ6NEkLjrcpchcrWXm2t0S6znMaiQ07WZ9rbyXjp2McWuhp-faksZrIKETGmXDkjB7k%3D)****

name: Blue Texas 2020
subject: Democrats can win in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
But right now the GOP is going all in to defeat us
| | | [](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-campaign_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk89-su-nd")
---
Friend: POLITICO is calling our race one of the biggest House battles in the country. **But right now the GOP is going ALL IN to defeat us.**
National Republicans are DOUBLING their campaign staff in battleground states - including Texas, where they'll fight to protect members like Chip Roy who are determined to dismantle reproductive rights. And Chip is also raking in tens of thousands of dollars from corporate PACs and lobbyists!
Democrats CAN win in Texas - but ONLY if we build the biggest, most powerful grassroots movement this state has ever seen. That's why - with our Democratic House majority AND the future of reproductive rights on the line - we need to know if you're going to be a part of it.
**We're asking 870 Democrats - including you - to answer just one question before midnight tonight:**
| | **Can we flip Texas blue in 2020?**

name: CoryBooker.com
subject: Trump's speech earlier this week...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | |
---
| Tell us how you feel about the direction in which our country is headed. Team, In case you missed it, Donald Trump delivered a State of the Union address this week that was partisan and divisive -- as we would come to expect from this president. He claimed credit for the growing economy. He reaffirmed his support for harsh, inhumane anti-immigrant policies. He made false claims about his health care positions -- all while his administration is trying to undermine the Affordable Care Act in court. **[These are just a few of the problematic and misleading things he said during his speech. But we want to hear what you think. Take our State of the Union survey now.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/state-of-the-union-survey?source=em_su_20200209_CBcom_20200209-su-CBcom-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** It's safe to say that the state of our union right now is not strong. As a country, we're more divided than we've been in a very long time. We have a responsibility to support leaders who want to bridge the divides and start bringing people together again. This is a major reason we need to re-elect Cory, so we have a voice in the Senate who will counter Donald Trump's hatred and bigotry with a message of love and unity. **[Share your thoughts with us now by completing our State of the Union questionnaire. Our team would like your feedback about the direction of our country and how Cory can help us ensure a better future.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/state-of-the-union-survey?source=em_su_20200209_CBcom_20200209-su-CBcom-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** As Cory said right after the speech, let's make sure this is the last State of the Union address Donald Trump delivers as our president. Thanks for your input,
Team Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/state-of-the-union-survey?source=em_su_20200209_CBcom_20200209-su-CBcom-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb9/5fca0d19/7a15c36d/291d0de3/2450713592/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb9/5fca0d19/7a15c36d/291d0de2/2450713592/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb9/5fca0d19/7a15c36d/291d0de1/2450713592/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb9/5fca0d19/7a15c36d/291d0de0/2450713592/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/unsubscribe").

**Donald Trump will be in New Hampshire TOMORROW to rally his base before the primary.**
Flipping the Granite State to Republican leadership is a top priority for Trump. He's campaigning on a far-right agenda and doing everything he can to unseat Granite State Democrats. And since Senator Hassan only won by 1,017 votes in 2016, we've got to respond.
**We 've have to raise $7,000 before Trump arrives to help stop his momentum. [We're asking you, everyone, because Maggie isn't relying on corporate special interests. name: Andrew Yang
subject: The truth about the state of our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Everything rides on this goal

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7325%2E377263%2EIuv8bD) Yang Gang --

Here’s the truth: We need to hit our goal to have a shot at keeping this campaign competitive.

Yes, we’re growing in the polls. Yes, I was able to share my message on Friday night on the debate stage. And yes, we’re going to surprise a lot of people with our performance in New Hampshire on Tuesday.

But the truth is, we are behind. And we need a major surge to turn things around.

[Can you step up with a donation to help us hit our $2 million goal by midnight tomorrow? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25016?t=5&akid=7325%2E377263%2EIuv8bD) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25016?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=7325%2E377263%2EIuv8bD)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25016?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=7325%2E377263%2EIuv8bD)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25016?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=7325%2E377263%2EIuv8bD)
---
| | [$100 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25016?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=7325%2E377263%2EIuv8bD)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25016?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=7325%2E377263%2EIuv8bD)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25016?t=11&amount=25&akid=7325%2E377263%2EIuv8bD)
---
The Yang Gang is the most powerful force in American politics today. But it only works if we band together and do what we can to fight back.

We’ve seen what we can do when we stick together. We raised more money last quarter than many establishment candidates. We’ve surged in national polls and we’ve qualified for almost all of the debate stages while other politicians faltered.

We can do this.

Come fight with me,

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25016?t=12&akid=7325%2E377263%2EIuv8bD)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=7325%2E377263%2EIuv8bD) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=7325%2E377263%2EIuv8bD) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

| Hey, team - [can you chip in $5 to Michael Bennet's campaign?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaab8/134673f2/37f10f96/699731d5/2755151684/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B4_020920_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

We hate to be so direct, but there are only two more days until the New Hampshire primary, and we need your support now more than ever.

The polls have been unreliable, frontrunners have faltered, and HALF of voters remain undecided. Michael has held more than 80 town halls in the Granite State, answering every last question, and that's why more and more voters are giving him a shot!

subject: Stand and Fight beside Navy SEALS
body:
True the Vote's 2020 Plan calling all veterans and first responders | |
---
| | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=36727ad1f8&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=367200abc9&e=ad8cba7e98) | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ecbf51d015&e=ad8cba7e98)
---|---
| Are you ready?
---

Are you ready to roll up your sleeves and get to work for free and fair 2020 elections?

Tonight is the President’s State of the Union address, the Senate is schedule to vote tomorrow on the impeachment proceedings - and last night in Iowa we witnessed the chaos that ensues when untested voting "solutions" are forced by establishment juggernauts, rather than allowing citizens to control the election process themselves.

It’s like the starting gun for the beginning of the 2020 race. The next 9 months are going to be wild!

True the Vote is ramping back up - and we have some amazing programs in store that will help YOU take back control of your elections. We cannot wait until the last minute to mobilize. Real problems exist our the voting process, and history shows it’s up to us – the citizens – to address them!

| | |
---

| |
---

CALLING ALL VETERANS AND FIRST RESPONDERS
CONTINUE TO SERVE

[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=57490f99db&e=ad8cba7e98)

**Meet True the Vote's newest teammember,**
**Ed Hiner, Navy SEAL Lieutenant Commander (Ret.)**
| NEW OPPORTUNITIES TO CONNECT
---

Can you think of any better protector of the sanctity of our votes than veterans and first responders? If you are a veteran or have otherwise served (or are serving) as a first responder, retired Navy SEAL Lieutenant Commander Ed Hiner is coordinating volunteer efforts though our new **Continue to Serve** operations. **[To sign up click here. ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=3d570e38c3&e=ad8cba7e98) **
Let's Stay Connected! Please "subscribe", “like” or “follow” these pages! **[Fa cebook](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=68b5a4cd83&e=ad8cba7e98) [Twitter](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=8a17a2f55e&e=ad8cba7e98) [YouTube](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=57dcef9cc2&e=ad8cba7e98) [Instagram](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=0ce79e5980&e=ad8cba7e98)**
The state of our union depends on every one of us. Join us as we ramp up for free and fair elections in 2020!
Onward - Catherine Engelbrecht True the Vote Founder
**[PS. We rely on donations to keep going. Thank you in advance for any donation you can make, no matter the size. There's much work to be done - if you can, please donate to the cause!](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=bf9b6de2b6&e=ad8cba7e98)**
Donations made to True the Vote are tax deductible.
True the Vote is a 501c3 nonprofit organization, Federal Tax I.D. #27-2860095

| | PO Box 3109 #19128
Houston, TX 77253-3109
713.401.6017
---
| [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=d04413dec6&e=ad8cba7e98) | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=fa327e28d9&e=ad8cba7e98)
---|---

---
Dear Friend, On Saturday, retiring Congressman Bill Flores endorsed Renee Swann in the Republican primary race. On Sunday, The Waco Tribune-Herald editorial board wrote: _"Although we found Swann quite impassioned on topics in a general sense, she demonstrated a lack of knowledge, depth and context on even basic issues."_ In the same issue, the editorial board said of Rick: _"Kennedy might lack the easy charisma of Texas Democratic star Beto O'Rourke but not the intellect, energy, and constitutional savvy. body:

|

URGENT, Peter:

**Our last FEC filing deadline before the primary is in TWO DAYS and early voting begins next Tuesday** , so things are really coming down to the wire! MJ has the momentum, but there are still a _ton_ of undecided Texans out there.

**We need your help to hit our FEC Filing Deadline Goal on Wednesday so we 'll have the resources for a final push to reach undecided voters. [Will you rush a donation RIGHT NOW to help us reach our $75,000 goal?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890411/7f51f7bc/4d130fe4/4ef04733/4178032182/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-febfec?refcode=email_20200210.1nd__891__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
**[**DONATE NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890411/7f51f7bc/4d130fe4/4ef04733/4178032182/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-febfec?refcode=email_20200210.1nd__891__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
To win this race, we have to hit every goal we set. Because while Sen. Cornyn has an army of corporate PACs and special interests to help him buy his way to reelection, MJ is relying on all **29,000-plus members of this grassroots team** \-- and counting -- to help her fight back.

**MJ has traveled tens of thousands of miles and spoken to thousands of Texans so far. Will you rush a donation before Wednesday 's deadline to help her keep going?**

MJ has the momentum, but there are still a ton of undecided Texans out there. We need your help to hit our FEC Filing Deadline Goal on Wednesday so we 'll have the resources for a final push to reach undecided voters. "" "" To win this race, we have to hit every goal we set. Because while Sen. Since Friday, our grassroots movement has:

* Had our best debate day -- with more donations processing at the same time for our campaign than ever before,
* Reached our $2 million goal with a few days to spare,
* And, just yesterday, announced that we are doubling our goal to $4 million before New Hampshire!

**It's clear: people in Pennsylvania and across the country are fired up for big, structural change -- and they're taking action.**

But with only a little more than 24 hours until the New Hampshire primary, we can't slow down now. **We need your help to power through and set ourselves up for success in New Hampshire and beyond.**

**[This movement can win-- but it's going to take everyone doing their part. Can Elizabeth count on you to chip in $2 or anything you can today to help win big in New Hampshire?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852aeba/45c30650/1f808d02c/66e2c181/2175284288/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU81MUZfRUdMX0dSTV9XXzIwMjAwMjEwX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO51F_EGL_GRM_W_20200210_V1S1_P")**

Everything you do to support this campaign helps power our movement. It's how we were able to hire staff on the ground in over 30 states. It's how we mobilized thousands of volunteers to organize their own communities. **And thanks to you, it's how we're going to win the White House.**

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: We've had enough of Susan Collins' "political theater." If you have too, chip in whatever you can afford to defeat her now.
body:
It's just an excuse.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802941/4bef7a87/6d2a527a/287fbadc/333095454/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends, no one is buying Senator Collins' claim that Trump learned his lesson from impeachment. Just listen to CNN's Jeffrey Toobin:
_"The idea that anyone could think that this president was gonna change his behavior one iota, because of what went on in the Senate is an embarrassment."_
Can anyone really believe Senator Collins' defense? Trump himself said he hasn't learned a thing! She just needed political cover to justify her vote.
Well, we've had enough of Senator Collins' political theater. Have you?
[**Make a $3 contribution to defeat Susan Collins and elect Sara Gideon to the United States Senate.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802941/4bef7a87/6d2a527a/287fbad3/333095454/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMTAtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200210-1-full")
This grassroots team is growing bigger and stronger by the day. It's clear that Americans are ready to replace Susan Collins in the Senate and kick Mitch McConnell out as Majority Leader.
Thanks for your fight,
Team Sara
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802941/4bef7a87/6d2a527a/287fbad3/333095454/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMTAtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200210-1-full")**********

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802941/4bef7a87/6d2a527a/287fbad2/333095454/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. name: =?utf-8?Q?Heidi?=
subject: Make Calls for Heidi!
body:
Help us call every single primary voter in TX 25! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/heidifor25/make-calls-for-heidi?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| |
---
| |
# Get on the Heidi Dialer!

,

Thanks to our amazing volunteers, we're on track to knock 100,000 doors before March 3rd! We've come a long way in this campaign thanks to all of your hard work, but we need more help if we're going to win this primary election. So this week we're asking you to call primary voters all across Texas' 25th District to talk to them about our insurgent, working class campaign.

[**Will you organize a phone bank this Wednesday or Thursday to make calls for Heidi??**](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=c287561e6e&e=c169cb0a8e)

**Together, we can win the Democratic primary election, take on Roger Williams, and send a working class fighter to Congress.**

In solidarity,
Team Heidi

body:
When I talk about this being a people-powered campaign, I mean it.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14856202/156220136/464986751?refcode=em_surv_2020.02.10_b1_ed_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGU5YWU0ZS0zZjRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BIOjt0SKbYH3jmBVUAvH6aCEq4E0VXIoRE0QbnkodTU=) Team,

When I talk about this being a people-powered campaign, I mean it. Since day one, we’ve worked to prioritize the voices of South Central Pennsylvania. It’s why we host town halls and send regular surveys and polls to our email list. I want to make sure we’re staying on track with what people actually care about.

[**If you haven’t had the opportunity to attend a town hall, I hope you take a moment to submit a question, thought, or concern for me to address.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14856203/156220137/727455998?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGU5YWU0ZS0zZjRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BIOjt0SKbYH3jmBVUAvH6aCEq4E0VXIoRE0QbnkodTU=&emci=ac28df57-314c-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=d8e9ae4e-3f4c-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=10203249) | [Submit a question »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14856204/156220138/727455998?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGU5YWU0ZS0zZjRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BIOjt0SKbYH3jmBVUAvH6aCEq4E0VXIoRE0QbnkodTU=&emci=ac28df57-314c-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=d8e9ae4e-3f4c-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=10203249)
---
Today, I wanted to take a few moments to address a couple of the most popular topics we saw in our last survey:

**Where do you stand on voting rights?**
Across the country, we’ve seen laws that attempt to suppress voters. In the Pennsylvania state legislature, I opposed the partisan voter ID legislation that was eventually thrown out as unconstitutional. I believe we should be making it easier, not harder for people to vote. That means fighting back on these voter ID laws, ending voting purges, and making voting as accessible as possible. Our democracy is stronger when everyone has the opportunity to participate.
**How will you address climate change?**
We are already seeing the impacts of an all out climate crisis. Even here in South Central Pennsylvania, we’ve seen disastrous flooding and have some of the worst air quality in the country. As Auditor General, I spearheaded an audit that showed that climate change costs Pennsylvanians a staggering $261 million dollars in 2018 alone. We need to invest in clean jobs and make America’s manufacturing the greenest and most efficient in the world. In order to save our economy and prevent further destruction to our communities, we need to take bold, proactive, and comprehensive action to address the climate crisis.
[**In Congress, I plan on representing our district, not a party or ideology. I can’t thank you enough for taking the time to submit your questions and concerns to me. If you have anything you’d like to see me address in the future, I hope you submit it here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14856205/156220139/727455998?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGU5YWU0ZS0zZjRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BIOjt0SKbYH3jmBVUAvH6aCEq4E0VXIoRE0QbnkodTU=&emci=ac28df57-314c-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=d8e9ae4e-3f4c-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=10203249) [Share your thoughts »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14856206/156220140/727455998?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGU5YWU0ZS0zZjRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BIOjt0SKbYH3jmBVUAvH6aCEq4E0VXIoRE0QbnkodTU=&emci=ac28df57-314c-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=d8e9ae4e-3f4c-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=10203249)

Thank you for continuing to support my campaign, team. Together, we’re going to flip PA-10 blue.

Eugene **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14856207/156220141/464986751?refcode=em_surv_2020.02.10_b1_ed_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGU5YWU0ZS0zZjRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BIOjt0SKbYH3jmBVUAvH6aCEq4E0VXIoRE0QbnkodTU=)**

clean_body: When I talk about this being a people-powered campaign, I mean it. = Team, When I talk about this being a people-powered campaign, I mean it. Since day one, we’ve worked to prioritize the voices of South Central Pennsylvania. It’s why we host town halls and send regular surveys and polls to our email list. I want to make sure we’re staying on track with what people actually care about. | Today, I wanted to take a few moments to address a couple of the most popular topics we saw in our last survey: Where do you stand on voting rights? Across the country, we’ve seen laws that attempt to suppress voters. In the Pennsylvania state legislature, I opposed the partisan voter ID legislation that was eventually thrown out as unconstitutional. I believe we should be making it easier, not harder for people to vote. That means fighting back on these voter ID laws, ending voting purges, and making voting as accessible as possible. Our democracy is stronger when everyone has the opportunity to participate. How will you address climate change? We are already seeing the impacts of an all out climate crisis. Even here in South Central Pennsylvania, we’ve seen disastrous flooding and have some of the worst air quality in the country. As Auditor General, I spearheaded an audit that showed that climate change costs Pennsylvanians a staggering $261 million dollars in 2018 alone. We need to invest in clean jobs and make America’s manufacturing the greenest and most efficient in the world. In order to save our economy and prevent further destruction to our communities, we need to take bold, proactive, and comprehensive action to address the climate crisis. Thank you for continuing to support my campaign, team. Together, we’re going to flip PA-10 blue. Eugene = Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. name: Team Scholten
subject: We don’t need the establishment to back us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter,

Last cycle, the D.C. establishment and political pundits had written off Iowa’s 4th district. They all thought we had no shot of taking down Steve King. They said there was no way a Democrat could defeat an incumbent Republican in a rural district that Trump won by 27 points.

We started with no name recognition, didn’t have the backing of the D.C. elite, and refused to accept donations from corporate PACs and lobbyists. We believed -- and still do -- that our power should come from the people. Our campaign is all about getting out directly to the people, hitting the pavement, and earning trust and support one conversation at a time. With the power of people on our side, **_we came within 3 points._**

This time around, there’s even more momentum around our campaign -- but we’re still not on the DCCC’s Red-to-Blue list of flippable races.

That doesn’t matter to us. We’re leaving it all on the field and building a grassroots movement that can win, with or without the party establishment’s help.

What matters to us most of all is that you believe in us, Peter.

**[Contribute now and prove to the DCCC that we have what it takes to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14856606/156222048/-2077934265?refcode=em20_200210_dccc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGRiMjNmMS0zZjRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c5w5TEDBvhI6poqPnecfY1xITf9hML6xkCRxYc0ynXU=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14856608/156222051/-2077934265?refcode=em20_200210_dccc&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGRiMjNmMS0zZjRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c5w5TEDBvhI6poqPnecfY1xITf9hML6xkCRxYc0ynXU=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14856610/156222052/-2077934265?refcode=em20_200210_dccc&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGRiMjNmMS0zZjRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c5w5TEDBvhI6poqPnecfY1xITf9hML6xkCRxYc0ynXU=)

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: The only one left
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/RntkhBmtcCTbcYAdjXr385qa3kDZxrT8a4NfX_t6yds=/HMJCiOwPbuJlfOWAeEJsbAb5hPU3BSHj3krIoEf7vTg=?refcode=021020) | | Friend - Minnesota has the distinct honor of being the only divided legislature in the country - not including the United States Congress. This year I am hoping to change that.
To be clear: the legislative session (which starts tomorrow) will be difficult with the Republican-controlled Senate but we will work every single day to make a better future a reality for all Minnesotans.
Will you help us today by making a grassroots investment in our vision for a better Minnesota? Together we can strengthen our House DFL Majority and flip the Minnesota Senate: _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate Now: $10->](https://act.myngp.com/el/RntkhBmtcCTbcYAdjXr385qa3kDZxrT8a4NfX_t6yds=/HMJCiOwPbuJlfOWAeEJsbAb5hPU3BSHj3krIoEf7vTg=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=021020_25)** **[Donate Now: $25->](https://act.myngp.com/el/RntkhBmtcCTbcYAdjXr385qa3kDZxrT8a4NfX_t6yds=/q5x3VUqtrbAgtdWOoc-YG-uG135jI9HKuTdLHyv3g3c=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=EOM4)** **[Donate Now: $50->](https://act.myngp.com/el/RntkhBmtcCTbcYAdjXr385qa3kDZxrT8a4NfX_t6yds=/HMJCiOwPbuJlfOWAeEJsbAb5hPU3BSHj3krIoEf7vTg=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=021020_50)** **[Donate Now: $100->](https://act.myngp.com/el/RntkhBmtcCTbcYAdjXr385qa3kDZxrT8a4NfX_t6yds=/HMJCiOwPbuJlfOWAeEJsbAb5hPU3BSHj3krIoEf7vTg=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=021020_100)** **[Other Amount->](https://act.myngp.com/el/RntkhBmtcCTbcYAdjXr385qa3kDZxrT8a4NfX_t6yds=/HMJCiOwPbuJlfOWAeEJsbAb5hPU3BSHj3krIoEf7vTg=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=021020_other)** Your first $50 (or $100 per couple) is fully refundable each year through the Minnesota Political Campaign Refund Program.

name: Andrew Yang
subject: We’re aiming for a top finish in New Hampshire, but we can’t do it without your support. Please consider making a contribution today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7334%2E377263%2E-UuDjC) Yang Gang --

By midnight tonight, we will know if we hit our $2 million goal and set ourselves up for a top finish in the New Hampshire primary -- or if we missed the mark.

On this final day before voting begins, our staff and volunteers are on the ground and on the phones converting thousands of voters to our movement. I am thrilled and so impressed by every person working so hard.

Now, we need your help to push us over the finish line.

**[Friend, you will be the difference between hitting our $2 million goal by midnight tonight or falling short. Rush a donation of $10 or more right now to push us toward a big finish here in New Hampshire. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25069?t=5&akid=7334%2E377263%2E-UuDjC)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25069?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=7334%2E377263%2E-UuDjC)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25069?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=7334%2E377263%2E-UuDjC)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25069?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=7334%2E377263%2E-UuDjC)
---
| | [$100 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25069?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=7334%2E377263%2E-UuDjC)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25069?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=7334%2E377263%2E-UuDjC)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25069?t=11&amount=25&akid=7334%2E377263%2E-UuDjC)
---
As I go around the state, I am seeing the results of everyone’s hard work organizing and fundraising: packed and overflow crowds, new friends added to the Yang Gang in large numbers, and voters everywhere making up their minds to join our movement.

What you are doing is working, but it’s a crowded field, and unfortunately we’re running short on time. I need you to work harder than you ever have in these final moments before the New Hampshire primary.

**[These final 24 hours are all we have left to make a difference -- and we can only win this thing if we do it together. Pitch in $10 or more right now to help us hit our goal and take Humanity First all the way to the White House.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25069?t=12&akid=7334%2E377263%2E-UuDjC)**

-Andrew

name: Jared Golden, U.S. Representative
subject: I'm endorsing Michael Bennet for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friends,

After flipping a tough seat in 2018, I now represent Maine's Second District -- an area that voted for Barack Obama and then Donald Trump.

[Last week I announced my endorsement of Michael Bennet for president of the United States, and here's why:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaab4/134673f2/37f3ebe5/6997313c/2432794437/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_021020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

As the only candidate to win twice in a swing state, Michael's experience and Real Deal agenda will help Democrats up and down the ballot, galvanizing not only the Democratic base, but also helping win back some of the nine million Obama-Trump voters across the country.

[While many candidates blame the current president for our broken politics, Michael Bennet honestly identifies the challenges facing our democracy as decades old and going nowhere unless we commit to revitalize the good in our democracy and reform the worst.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaab4/134673f2/37f3ebe5/6997313c/2432794437/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_021020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[For these reasons and more, I believe Michael Bennet is the leader we need in the White House. Join me today and chip in to power Michael's campaign to victory before TOMORROW'S New Hampshire primary!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaab4/134673f2/37f3ebe5/6997313c/2432794437/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_021020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

And most importantly, after years of divisive leadership from Washington, Michael Bennet is committed to leading this country by example toward a more unified and thoughtful future.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaab4/134673f2/37f3ebe5/6997313c/2432794437/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_021020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[ **Stand up to Anthony Brindisi** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=e974f146c3064a95bfda2afc6f3369eb&_e=4cBya8My2wknawWGqvO1N4-lL7ohM7iiTIWs0aXz3Z4yGG9qgFmhgYIhUIv6WUNWIvUyJsbc6NFmikPkvISw2tPJPzVM7IjHydSL8UVdIUtv8fksuE6F494Eewf9Gon4tYG6Kw5sP6LO9uxzDChM3IrpYFOSo-UDujNRas1lF3YVS27RUkDPYSbLVxpOQl6EUIB76SqC_0L1UZf246ouVF5GoH4UfQlTy_oPEfFc2CNAnskP1PQsJqwSQ8nOIZW9DQEulSb-X0LDxOeHvXF1OiHBeQLWqrU1XtQMqYMhsNmDnmMFaUOicPZlXRKNB8549dH4QJKUqnDApk5D332mE2lfTu_A0rGJSi90sSfXaGncaH0d43Hpf0nUBaF-u_2kgNAGNroB0I5GMZE9um6y_oSXUY2eKmoT-r7wJ8OWP8rJGIpaSC6vy6ow9HohPD0U)
**Anthony Brindisi claims to be bipartisan, but only votes with President Trump 9.2% of the time!** That’s less than Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez.

Our district elected President Trump by over 15%, but Anthony Brindisi voted for impeachment THREE TIMES! Our elected officials should represent us, not ultra-liberal Democrats like Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff. We deserve better.

**That’s why I need 1,000 New Yorkers to sign this petition and stand up to Anthony Brindisi!**
[ **Stand up to Anthony Brindisi** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=e974f146c3064a95bfda2afc6f3369eb&_e=4cBya8My2wknawWGqvO1N4-lL7ohM7iiTIWs0aXz3Z4yGG9qgFmhgYIhUIv6WUNWIvUyJsbc6NFmikPkvISw2tPJPzVM7IjHydSL8UVdIUtv8fksuE6F494Eewf9Gon4tYG6Kw5sP6LO9uxzDChM3IrpYFOSo-UDujNRas1lF3YVS27RUkDPYSbLVxpOQl6EUIB76SqC_0L1UZf246ouVF5GoH4UfQlTy_oPEfFc2CNGTw8yImSthoNuQTlTixKMElOzZHZhwB-je73-SAojNz-VMQcVE5v4WFV7qzid7WtbRiAQ8FwG0Aqcc_aT-jWTDx_2qQTDyaV3UTNgPzUeEi2y4_l_DRJ_8HSTB738mzo-OkPSofXalDRMxfYapGl0bhFQup3Tga43BwesJist4eNku7CPxTMxAXcWaQx_bMr1Qlbv0EoOQBybU4y6nNu-)
When I was in Congress, I worked closely with President Trump to deliver real results for the people of Upstate New York.

With his support, I was able to deliver historic tax reform, dramatically reduce burdensome and unnecessary regulations, provide increased funding to Upstate New York’s military assets, and so much more.

Peter, Anthony Brindisi has failed us. He can’t get anything done because he’s too busy playing political games and trying to take down President Trump.

**[I need you to add your name and stand up to Anthony Brindisi!>>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=e974f146c3064a95bfda2afc6f3369eb&_e=4cBya8My2wknawWGqvO1N4-lL7ohM7iiTIWs0aXz3Z4yGG9qgFmhgYIhUIv6WUNWIvUyJsbc6NFmikPkvISw2tPJPzVM7IjHydSL8UVdIUtv8fksuE6F494Eewf9Gon4tYG6Kw5sP6LO9uxzDChM3IrpYFOSo-UDujNRas1lF3YVS27RUkDPYSbLVxpOQl6EUIB76SqC_0L1UZf246ouVF5GoH4UfQlTy_oPEfFc2CPRyiw_SZ5FXq3QKtwp2bbjRlj9nStULJJt4m8KWyC2593bYHD11b5cHmd_AeGAFgVePiZYSovVgGFtscA3U4xsfps4qmTx9tvrC6OpZRjCdFh3vyC8hoFa7xVco_8S_6dhqa_0BpsNc-960fIh2RxY_HiPQTe237aZtSOIjHY_DjfjiPwCu0uNi5WoW5rRsOo5t8eqczAyWHLl2joZD8vz)**

Thank you,

Claudia Tenney

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Americans Have Failed People With Mental Illness. Trump’s New Budget Will Change That.
body:
"President Trump is exceptionally focused on fighting for Americans who can’t fight for themselves and confronting problems..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5f801e7015&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Americans Have Failed People With Mental Illness. Trump’s New Budget Will Change That.**

“President Trump is exceptionally focused on fighting for Americans who can’t fight for themselves and confronting problems other administrations, Democratic and Republican, have ignored. This is particularly true for Americans who suffer from addiction and serious mental disorders,” White House Domestic Policy Council Director Joe Grogan writes.

Nearly 50 million Americans experienced some form of mental illness in 2018. The President’s new budget, out today, proposes the boldest reforms in decades to help them.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e772cbe39a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| President Trump’s fiscal 2021 budget comes “with boosts to programs the public support, cuts in those that, for years, conservative presidents have promised but never delivered on, and a long-term promise to cut the deficit.” The Trump Administration “is also putting a focus on rural America by increasing spending for roads, healthcare, and internet service,” Paul Bedard reports for the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fe02fc46ef&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Democrats talk a big game about raising living standards for the ‘little man,’ but the Trump administration is getting it done: from school choice, criminal justice reform, opportunity zones, record-low minority unemployment, and more. Democrats have promised reform on these issues for generations — but Trump is actually getting it done for disenfranchised urban communities,” Adam Brandon writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ee57364970&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/life-is-good-in-trumps-america-and-democrats-want-to-break-it")
---
|
---
| “There have been many spectacular jobs reports over the past three years, but the January 2020 jobs report is really quite exceptional.” One big reason for that is an increase in labor-force participation among workers who had left the job market entirely. “Rising wages and an abundance of job opportunities are enticing more Americans to enter the workforce,” former CKE Restaurants CEO Andy Puzder writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=33559a17a5&e=3ee4985eea).
---

clean_body: "President Trump is exceptionally focused on fighting for Americans who can’t fight for themselves and confronting problems..." | | | | | | | Americans Have Failed People With Mental Illness. Trump’s New Budget Will Change That. “President Trump is exceptionally focused on fighting for Americans who can’t fight for themselves and confronting problems other administrations, Democratic and Republican, have ignored. This is particularly true for Americans who suffer from addiction and serious mental disorders,” White House Domestic Policy Council Director Joe Grogan writes. Nearly 50 million Americans experienced some form of mental illness in 2018. The President’s new budget, out today, proposes the boldest reforms in decades to help them. | | President Trump’s fiscal 2021 budget comes “with boosts to programs the public support, cuts in those that, for years, conservative presidents have promised but never delivered on, and a long-term promise to cut the deficit.” The Trump Administration “is also putting a focus on rural America by increasing spending for roads, healthcare, and internet service,” Paul Bedard reports for the . | | “Democrats talk a big game about raising living standards for the ‘little man,’ but the Trump administration is getting it done: from school choice, criminal justice reform, opportunity zones, record-low minority unemployment, and more. Democrats have promised reform on these issues for generations — but Trump is actually getting it done for disenfranchised urban communities,” Adam Brandon writes in the "" | | “There have been many spectacular jobs reports over the past three years, but the January 2020 jobs report is really quite exceptional.” One big reason for that is an increase in labor-force participation among workers who had left the job market entirely. “Rising wages and an abundance of job opportunities are enticing more Americans to enter the workforce,” former CKE Restaurants CEO Andy Puzder writes for . | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Charles Booker
subject: Give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
#
In just a moment, [I am going to ask you to donate to our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14860479/156260873/-205130586?refcode=em20200210&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTJiMDE2Ny01MDRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QfCp1nzr7EKZEJyoqI5W57ngHxuZ9jztO89SwDJ6ULw=) But before I do, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why it’s so important.
I grew up in the West End of Louisville in the 40203 — the poorest ZIP in the state. Growing up, my mom would go hungry so my cousins and I could eat. When I was diagnosed with diabetes, we rationed the insulin just to get by.
I know what it’s like to live in the forgotten places of Kentucky. My friends, my neighbors, and I understand. For a long time, a big part of this state has been ignored, drowned out, and exploited.
**At the center of it all we have Mitch McConnell, a man who has built an empire on top of our pain and poverty.** We know he needs to be defeated.
The question is: how? In my mind, you’re not going to beat him by running a “smarter” campaign or tearing him down. Nope. The only way is with a movement built on solidarity among marginalized Kentuckians. To grow that, we’re going to need the resources to reach as many people as possible.
[So today, I’m asking for your help to build the movement that can defeat Mitch McConnell. We’re asking for a $5 contribution.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14860493/156260887/-205130586?refcode=em20200210&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTJiMDE2Ny01MDRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QfCp1nzr7EKZEJyoqI5W57ngHxuZ9jztO89SwDJ6ULw=) Without you, this ain’t going to work. The more people who give today, the stronger we get.
**[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14860494/156260888/-205130586?refcode=em20200210&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTJiMDE2Ny01MDRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QfCp1nzr7EKZEJyoqI5W57ngHxuZ9jztO89SwDJ6ULw=)**
Momentum is fuel for movement building. And you can strike the match and set this off right here by making that contribution to defeat Mitch McConnell. One of you making a donation can lead to another being inspired to do so. Two people believing can lead to five or six people believing — then we’re on fire.
Kentucky is not a “red state.” It’s a disenfranchised state. It’s a commonwealth where a whole lot of people haven’t been heard in a heck of a long time. It’s a state where the number of people who don’t vote outnumber those who do. If we change that, you are going to see the greatest upset in the history of American politics. **We are going to beat Mitch McConnell.**
[It all comes down to this. Will you take the leap of faith and help us build this historic campaign by making a $5 contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14860495/156260889/-205130586?refcode=em20200210&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTJiMDE2Ny01MDRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QfCp1nzr7EKZEJyoqI5W57ngHxuZ9jztO89SwDJ6ULw=)
We are faithful. We know this can work. We just need a few more of you to help us meet this moment.
It’s an honor to be in the fight with you,
Charles Booker

**[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14860496/156260890/-205130586?refcode=em20200210-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTJiMDE2Ny01MDRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QfCp1nzr7EKZEJyoqI5W57ngHxuZ9jztO89SwDJ6ULw=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14860497/156260891/-640535987?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTJiMDE2Ny01MDRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QfCp1nzr7EKZEJyoqI5W57ngHxuZ9jztO89SwDJ6ULw=&emci=a42b0167-504c-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=a52b0167-504c-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14860498/156260892/-778353598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTJiMDE2Ny01MDRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QfCp1nzr7EKZEJyoqI5W57ngHxuZ9jztO89SwDJ6ULw=&emci=a42b0167-504c-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=a52b0167-504c-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14860499/156260893/-1403296926?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTJiMDE2Ny01MDRjLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QfCp1nzr7EKZEJyoqI5W57ngHxuZ9jztO89SwDJ6ULw=&emci=a42b0167-504c-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=a52b0167-504c-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=2635570)

body:
Bobby Schilling defeats Mariannette Miller-Meeks 60%-40% | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/infobobbyforiowacom?e=90fad69796)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
# _**Bobby Schilling Defeats Miller-Meeks in **** Iowa's Youth Straw Poll.**_
We are proud to announce that last weeks Iowa Secretary of State Youth Straw Poll results are in! **We have soundly defeated Mariannette Miller-Meeks for the second straight time!! (60%-40%).** Thanks to the youth of Iowa and the proud parents who have taught them the strength of conservative values. Our campaign has appealed to the everyday Iowans that want to see this United States House seat flip red for the first time in 14 years!

When I was in office I fought tooth and nail to defund Planned Parenthood, strengthen our 2nd fights and we helped bring good paying jobs into our District and I promise I'll do it again! As our great President Donald J. Trump said at his State of the Union address "**the best is yet to come** ".

I am the only candidate in this race with the political courage to stand up to the radical liberal left, that's hell bent on destroying the America Family as we know it! When I am the candidate in the General election this November we will win!

If you're ready for a proven Leader, someone who can actually win in November and a United States Congressman that will stand up and fight for Iowa Values, the Unborn, and your 2nd Amendment rights please get involved, share this email with as many people as possible and most importantly visit my website at [BobbyForIowa.com](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=a1db7a0871&e=90fad69796 "http://BobbyForIowa.com"), or click the donation button below.

May God Bless each and everyone of you. Please remember to pray for those that have served and are currently serving in our military allowing us to be free.

For Iowa,

\- Bobby Schilling

name: Michigan Senate Alert (3)
subject: A HUGE update:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Gary Peters chose to defend the Constitution by voting to convict Donald Trump of impeachment charges

---
| |
---
Friend, after Gary Peters chose to defend the Constitution by voting to convict Donald Trump of impeachment charges, Mitch McConnell and national Republicans started attacking him.

And now, analysts at CBS News report that Senate control hinges on what happens here in Michigan. But for the second straight time, Gary was outraised by his right-wing, Trump-backed opponent.

**With polling showing Gary TIED in this race that will decide Senate control, things are not looking good.** **That's why, to fight back, Gary just launched his first TV ad! But if Gary's going to win in Michigan and take back the Senate, we need to raise another $25,819 by 10:00 p.m. tonight. **

But right now, with Senate control on the line, we're falling short of our goal, and time's running out. In a race this close, every dollar could make the difference between winning and losing.
**Friend: the path to Senate control runs straight through Michigan, so Gary's counting on your immediate contribution. name: Dan Rowe, Powered By People
subject: Lagging behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

The
election season is officially in full gear.

We’ve been planning our next moves and doing the research needed to launch
another massive voter-contact program for our upcoming slate of
candidates. But there’s a catch:

In January, we were almost entirely focused on organizing in Fort Bend (as
I’m sure you gathered from all our emails). The effort we — all of us —
put forth was remarkable. That also means our fundraising has fallen
behind pretty badly.

So as we prepare for our next phase, we really need to devote the next few
weeks to closing that gap — $3, $5, $10 at a time. We only accept
donations from people like you. Can we count on you to help?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42275?refcode=ema20200210-79154&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=79154%2E444211%2EQPp_uC ]Make a donation today of any amount and help us make up for the ground
we lost in January.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42275?refcode=ema20200210-79154&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=79154%2E444211%2EQPp_uC ]Contribute

It takes a lot of resources to pull off such an ambitious organizing
program: fliers, ads, gas and housing, you name it. But the work is worth
it. We mobilized over a thousand volunteers to knock on 41,000 doors.

Those are the kinds of numbers that we know can win elections. We’ve seen
it before. But we’re not going to settle for just a repeat — between now
and Election Day, we’re going to shatter those numbers. And your help
today is what’ll make it all possible.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42275?source=ema20200210-79154&t=1021&akid=79154%2E444211%2EQPp_uC ]Can you donate $3, $5, or whatever you can afford to help us get our
fundraising back on track?

Thanks for everything.
We have big things planned and we can’t do it without you.

Gratefully,

Dan Rowe
Powered By People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42275?refcode=ema20200210-79154&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=79154%2E444211%2EQPp_uC ]Contribute

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=79154%2E444211%2EQPp_uC

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

name: Tim Walz
subject: Thanks
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor |
body:
My friend,

Before the 2020 legislative session convenes tomorrow, I wanted to thank you again for being a part of this team.

Last year, in one of the only divided governments in the country, we were able to negotiate a budget deal that is improving the lives of millions of people across our state – from Minneapolis to Mankato and Rondo to the Range.

We stayed true to our values and put a down payment on One Minnesota. And this year is our chance to take a critical next step.

To prove that our movement is more fired up than ever to get the job done, I’m hoping you’ll help us finish strong and reach our $2,500 budget target by midnight. According to our fundraising team, we’re still just about $800 short.

We’re almost there, but the clock is ticking. Will you use the link to chip in before we run out of time?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2020-leg-session

Thanks again for everything you do for our state. I look forward to fighting alongside you this session.

I’m grateful,

Tim Walz

--------------------------------------------------------
| Prepared and paid for by Tim Walz for Governor |

| | |
# National Democrats add Kansas Republican Steve Watkins to 2020 Target List

| | | | In an [article released](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=6186939166&e=1050d051da) last month, the national Democrats and the DCCC have stated that they will now be targeting Kansas' 2nd congressional district for a Democrat take over _**calling Rep. Watkins a "weak Republican incumbent who barely won in 2018" that spent his first year in office "distracted by scandals". The Democrats believe there is now an opportunity for them to easily win the seat.**_

Nancy Pelosi’s political machine just made official what we’ve known all along. **_Steve Watkins puts the Kansas 2 nd congressional district seat in jeopardy of Democratic takeover._**

[Will you pitch in to help keep Kansas Red and prevent another Democrat takeover?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=10425c355a&e=1050d051da)
---
| | |
As President Reagan famously said, “Now is the time for choosing”. _**If you want Nancy Pelosi to have another vote from Kansas, you should vote for Steve Watkins.**_

But if you want this seat to stay in Republican hands, if you want a conservative leader with a proven track record, and if you want representation from someone you can trust, you should join Jake LaTurner in this fight.

We need a Republican who will stand with President Trump and not put this seat at risk. [Would you consider contributing $10, $20, or even $50 to show Nancy Pelosi we won't stand for this?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=acb4be065b&e=1050d051da)
---
|
Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner

URGENT, Peter:

**Our last FEC filing deadline before the primary is in TWO DAYS and early voting begins next Tuesday** , so things are really coming down to the wire! MJ has the momentum, but there are still a _ton_ of undecided Texans out there.

**We need your help to hit our FEC Filing Deadline Goal on Wednesday so we 'll have the resources for a final push to reach undecided voters. Because of my parents' sacrifice, I earned a scholarship to the United States Air Force Academy. After I graduated, I met my husband Rob in pilot training and deployed to the Middle East five separate times.
**I served my country alongside other children of immigrants like me** \-- and even immigrants who were willing to put their lives on the line to fight for their adopted country and the promise that America represents.
Here's the deal -- **Donald Trump is a coward and a bully.** And when he attacks immigrants like my parents, he's not being a patriot. He's fundamentally perverting the soul of our country to try and score points with his political base.
There seems to be no low Donald Trump refuses to stoop to -- it's time for a broad rejection of everything he stands for. That starts with taking down his allies -- [**will you chip in to my Democratic campaign to unseat one of his most loyal defenders in Congress, Steve Chabot?**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_feb?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200210_Bio_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=9+-+will+you+chip+in+to+my+Democratic+campai&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200210_Bio_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200210_Bio_U2_X1")

subject: At this moment, it looks like we will miss this goal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7350%2E377263%2EU_UTZI) Yang Gang --

A few days ago we set a goal of raising $2 million by February 10 at midnight. **Right now it’s not looking good. Here’s where we’re at:** [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25101?t=5&akid=7350%2E377263%2EU_UTZI) This is not where we expected to be, Yang Gang.

Missing this goal would set us back. We’ve budgeted our strategy in New Hampshire under the assumption that we would reach our goal. We’ve hired staff and opened field offices with this goal in mind.

**[It’s simple -- we cannot afford to miss this goal. Will you step up with a donation of $10 or more right now?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25101?t=6&akid=7350%2E377263%2EU_UTZI)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25101?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=7350%2E377263%2EU_UTZI)

Thank you,

Yang2020 HQ

name: Team Sri
subject: About lowering prescription drug costs...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/SJWN11uIBoJXJiAM_C6ZI0snGW15h-Bwx9KhO8ggTDQ=/_r9INlG9VdB4p2CEt4WKroieVAbtqvQ8Vi7QajMIcDA=)
---
**2017** : "We should implement legal reforms that protect patients and doctors from unnecessary costs that drive up the price of insurance - and work to bring down the artificially high price of drugs and bring them down immediately."

**2018** : "One of my greatest priorities is to reduce the price of prescription drugs. [...] That is why I have directed my administration to make fixing the injustice of high drug prices one of my top priorities for the year. And prices will come down substantially, watch."

**2019** : "[...] I am asking the Congress to pass legislation that finally takes on the problem of global freeloading and delivers fairness and price transparency for American patients."

Team,

Every year, Trump makes and breaks the same promises over and over again.

No one in our community, no American, deserves to be crushed under the weight of medical debt. No one should have to choose between purchasing life-saving prescription drugs and paying their rent.

_Americans deserve better._

**[Add your name to Sri's to demand that President Trump and GOP lawmakers finally deliver on their promises to lower prescription drug prices!](https://act.myngp.com/el/SJWN11uIBoJXJiAM_C6ZI0snGW15h-Bwx9KhO8ggTDQ=/_r9INlG9VdB4p2CEt4WKroieVAbtqvQ8Vi7QajMIcDA=)**

While the President continues to proudly declare that his administration is "taking on the big pharmaceutical companies," we know that all he and Mitch McConnell have done is sit on H.R. 3, which would allow the federal government to directly negotiate lower drug prices in Medicare.

We've seen the same broken lies from the GOP over and over.

**[It's time for new leadership. It's time to act on lowering prescription drug costs. Add your name if you agree >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/SJWN11uIBoJXJiAM_C6ZI0snGW15h-Bwx9KhO8ggTDQ=/_r9INlG9VdB4p2CEt4WKroieVAbtqvQ8Vi7QajMIcDA=)**

Thank you,

Team Sri
| | **[Add Your Name ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/SJWN11uIBoJXJiAM_C6ZI0snGW15h-Bwx9KhO8ggTDQ=/_r9INlG9VdB4p2CEt4WKroieVAbtqvQ8Vi7QajMIcDA=)**
---

**STAY CONNECTED WITH OUR MOVEMENT** **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/SJWN11uIBoJXJiAM_C6ZI0snGW15h-Bwx9KhO8ggTDQ=/LwalwK4m4nhXFz0Qe1lovjnNQpPg1XXDy0JMb-QJCps=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/SJWN11uIBoJXJiAM_C6ZI0snGW15h-Bwx9KhO8ggTDQ=/piaxLE4uWElJI-pj7VNkQbj5OV2IJAZRQQdB1VVivd4=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/SJWN11uIBoJXJiAM_C6ZI0snGW15h-Bwx9KhO8ggTDQ=/r0mwklB_NNdyFs7bCnsqhw0F65U0WBUy9xg4CG1wWYM=)** | Paid for by Sri for Congress.

name: Whitney (Team Collins)
subject: 2020 is going to be about MAINE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
There is no question about it -- Maine is going to be the state that everyone is talking about come November 3rd 2020. This election is going to be one of the most contested -- and expensive -- Senate races in the country.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDE3NDkyODcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDg2Mjc4NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDE3NDkyODcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDg2Mjc4NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_****_
Hi there Peter,
There is no question about it -- _**Maine is going to be the state that everyone is talking about come November 3rd 2020.**_
This election is going to be one of the most contested -- and expensive -- Senate races in the country. Dark money groups have already invested millions into trying distort Susan Collins' record, and this is only the beginning.
There is no line that these dark money groups will not cross... _**Susan is being attacked from all the Washington, DC-based far left groups.**_[**Any contribution to Susan 's campaign would make a huge difference in her ability to fight back against the radical dark money groups.****Please consider giving anything you can today!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=NDE3NDkyODcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDg2Mjc4NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

The Far Left and their dark money allies have their eyes set on Maine. Susan is counting on you, Peter. [**Please contribute today.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDE3NDkyODcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDg2Mjc4NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

subject: Win FREE tickets to the Blue Commonwealth Gala
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d637/53d9897e/536de805/1c89b4c2/461604223/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-bluecommonwealthgala?refcode=20200210_f_1_nd__466__&refcode2=graphic&amount=10")
---
Win tickets to see Mark Warner on February 15th. **[DONATE NOW TO ENTER](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d637/53d9897e/536de805/1c89b4c1/461604223/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-bluecommonwealthgala?refcode=20200210_f_1_nd__466__&refcode2=top&amount=10")**
---
Derek --

**The Democratic Party of Virginia 's premier annual event, the Blue Commonwealth Gala, is coming up on Saturday, February 15 -- _and you could be there!_ [When you make a donation to Mark's campaign through this email](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d637/53d9897e/536de805/1c89b4c0/461604223/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-bluecommonwealthgala?refcode=20200210_f_1_nd__466__&refcode2=ask1&amount=10")**, you'll be automatically entered to win two tickets to the gala in Richmond.

At the gala, you'll hear Mark Warner and Democratic leaders from across Virginia and the country reflect on recent successes and the challenges we still face in 2020. Mark is excited to be one of the featured speakers -- and he would love to know you're there to support the party and enjoy the special evening.

Don't miss your chance to attend the biggest night in Virginia politics. **[Donate through this email and you'll automatically be entered to win two tickets to the Blue Commonwealth Gala on February 15.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d637/53d9897e/536de805/1c89b4cf/461604223/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-bluecommonwealthgala?refcode=20200210_f_1_nd__466__&refcode2=ask2&amount=10")**

Hope to see you there,

Team Warner

No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by Wednesday, February 12, 2020. Enter by contributing [here](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d637/53d9897e/536de805/1c89b4ce/461604223/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-bluecommonwealthgala?refcode=20200210_f_1_nd__466__&refcode2=disclaimer&amount=10") or click [here](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d637/53d9897e/536de805/1c89b4cd/461604223/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-bluecommonwealthgala") to enter without contributing. One (1) winner and one (1) guest will receive the following prize package: one (1) ticket to the Democratic Party of Virginia's Blue Commonwealth Gala in Richmond, Virginia on Saturday, February 15, 2020, and an opportunity to meet Senator Mark Warner (approx. retail value $300). Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). View full official rules [here](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d637/53d9897e/536de805/1c89b4cc/461604223/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "http://warnerforva.bsd.net/page/content/warner-2020galarules/"). Sponsor: Friends of Mark Warner, P.O. Box 26188,1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213, Williamsburg, VA 23185.

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d637/53d9897e/536de805/1c89b4cb/461604223/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-bluecommonwealthgala?refcode=20200210_f_1_nd__466__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")**

body:

name: Laura, Gov. Gretchen Whitmer (2)
subject: Checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | | |
---
Hey Team - We've been hearing from so many of you about Gov. Gretchen Whitmer's response to Trump's State of the Union, and we're thrilled about the reaction. It's clear that her message of progress is resonating with Democrats, but we need to heard from you today, Team.

We still need 16 more people in 34223 to tell us where they stand on Donald Trump. We're counting on you, Team.
| | **Do you approve of Donald Trump?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MTY5MzkyNzYS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDYzNzE4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MTY5MzkyNzYS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDYzNzE4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Thanks so much for your input,

Laura Carlson
DGA Digital Director

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Governor Gretchen Whitmer
Date: Wed, February 5, 2020
Subject: My response to Donald Trump

| | Team, did you catch my speech last night? I gave the official Democratic response to the State of the Union, and I took the opportunity to highlight the fact that while Republicans are talking the talk, Democrats in Michigan and around the country are walking the walk.

From statehouses to governorships to the halls of Congress, Democrats are getting things done for the American people. And with your help, we can do even more.

[**If you 're tired of all the talking Donald Trump does and you're ready to get to work, will you take a minute to weigh in?**](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTY5MzkyNzYS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDYzNzE4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

---
| | **Do you approve of Donald Trump?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MTY5MzkyNzYS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDYzNzE4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MTY5MzkyNzYS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDYzNzE4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
I flipped Michigan blue in 2018 by focusing on the issues voters care about - healthcare, infrastructure, and an economy that works. **Team, no matter what Donald Trump says, I know one thing for certain: Democrats can accomplish anything when we come together and put in the work.**
Across the country, Democratic governors and Democratic legislators are expanding access to health care, funding quality public education, and finding solutions to fix our nation's crumbling infrastructure - how we #FTDR, or as we say in Michigan: fix the damn roads!
I'm proud of the work Democrats in Congress have done to make sure there's a check on Donald Trump. **And in states across the country, it 's clear that Democratic governors are the strongest line of defense against the harmful Trump agenda.**

NBC released a new poll showing 46% of people approve of the job Donald Trump is doing. Following the State of the Union, the DGA is conducting its own Trump Approval poll to test these results - but we haven't heard from you.
| | **Do you approve of Donald Trump?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MTY5MzkyNzYS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDYzNzE4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY5MzkyNzYS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDYzNzE4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

We can't let this moment pass us by - not after we've seen what a Trump presidency looks like.

I'm counting on you to speak out, Team.

Thank you,

Gretchen Whitmer
Governor of Michigan

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, [click here](https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=16939276&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTgyMDYzNzE4MgS2&spReportId=MTgyMDYzNzE4MgS2). | | Paid for by Democratic Governors Association.
---

name: Stephanie Noguera, Team Kennedy
subject: we are building the grassroots campaign MA deserves.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639030e/55b66746/22c7bb70/80fe965/631358212/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | I've been working with Joe since 2012, and I've never seen anything like what I saw yesterday.
(there were so many people it was difficult to fit everyone into one panoramic photo!!) Over 400 supporters packed the Carpenters Union Hall in Boston for our first Kennedy Regional Organizing Convention. And holy smokes, it was amazing. I'm an organizer - through and through, I have been my entire life - and I was just blown away. The energy as Joe spoke, the friends who introduced him, the break out training sessions, the hugs, the handshakes, the conversations - wow. We have something building here and I'm just so excited! **Lots of campaigns send out press releases and emails and tweets about being "grassroots" but honestly, what I saw yesterday, that was the real deal.** 400 friends gathered together, dozens via video chat, and the greatest field organizing staff in the world - all in one place. It was special. Not to mention, we made thousands of phone calls to close out the exciting day of training sessions. Pretty cool. We're so proud of what we are building. It's electric. And it's possible because of the supporters in that room, and supporters like you, it's possible. We've got momentum and can't wait to keep building until our primary on September first and beyond. Talk soon - Go, Joe! -Steph Stephanie Noguera
Field Organizing Director

clean_body: | "" | | I've been working with Joe since 2012, and I've never seen anything like what I saw yesterday. (there were so many people it was difficult to fit everyone into one panoramic photo!!) Over 400 supporters packed the Carpenters Union Hall in Boston for our first Kennedy Regional Organizing Convention. And holy smokes, it was amazing. I'm an organizer - through and through, I have been my entire life - and I was just blown away. The energy as Joe spoke, the friends who introduced him, the break out training sessions, the hugs, the handshakes, the conversations - wow. We have something building here and I'm just so excited! Lots of campaigns send out press releases and emails and tweets about being "grassroots" but honestly, what I saw yesterday, that was the real deal. 400 friends gathered together, dozens via video chat, and the greatest field organizing staff in the world - all in one place. It was special. Not to mention, we made thousands of phone calls to close out the exciting day of training sessions. Pretty cool. We're so proud of what we are building. It's electric. And it's possible because of the supporters in that room, and supporters like you, it's possible. We've got momentum and can't wait to keep building until our primary on September first and beyond. Talk soon - Go, Joe! -Steph Stephanie Noguera Field Organizing Director "" | We are building something special here. Every dollar invested in this campaign goes directly to growing the organization needed to do great things and win this election.
