name: Laura Loomer
subject: "Trumpy Bigot"
body:
Leftists are sweating bullets after my first poll numbers came out last week. Here was one headline from the Daily Beast over the weekend
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363786-852223-4859681-7323851ed5-9d98aa4dd1)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363786-852223-4859681-7323851ed5-9d98aa4dd1) Leftists are sweating bullets after my first poll numbers came out last week.

Here was one headline from the Daily Beast over the weekend:

**Laura Loomer, Trumpy Bigot Embraced by the Florida GOP,
Could Actually Get to Congress**
They should bet on it. [**We’re winning and you can donate here to help!**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363786-852223-4859681-7323851ed5-9d98aa4dd1)

But I want to say something about this author, Dean Obeidallah.

I’m sympathetic to his condition which thousands of Liberals are suffering from around the nation . . . and it’s getting worse.

**Obeidallah suffers from Trump Derangement Syndrome (TDS).**

TDS is an unhealthy obsession and extreme hatred for President Trump.

For instance, within three hours of sitting down to write this email to you, poor Dean posted 17 lengthy hate-filled tweets irrationally blasting his President.

Within his article about me, Deranged Dean didn’t hold back:

> _It’s clear though that regardless of how long Trump remains in the White House, he and many in his base want Trumpism—a celebration of**cruelty, bigotry, and sexism** —to continue long after he’s gone. **That helps explain Trump’s support for anti-Muslim bigot Laura Loomer** , who is running for Congress in Florida’s 21st District—and, incredibly, is increasingly the likely GOP nominee . . . This is the time of Trump, and Loomer is Trumpism personified._
Do you see the hypocrisy there? If President Trump is a cruel bigot and sexist, why would he support a Jewish woman for Congress?

Why would President Trump’s work result in the Black unemployment rate at the lowest levels in history?

If President Trump is a sexist, why would his administration place so much focus on lifting up women resulting in the lowest unemployment rate for women in 70 years?!

The truth is, results don’t matter to those suffering from TDS.

**If they hate you, you’re a racist, you’re a sexist, you’re a “Nazi” and no facts matter.**

Even worse, they’ll fabricate just about anything.

Poor Deranged Dean closed his article suggesting I was in Charlottesville. I was not, and I was an outspoken critic of the event that ended in tragedy. But again, facts don’t matter to TDS sufferers.

If you can, [**please click here to send a Tweet to poor Dean**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363786-852223-4859681-7323851ed5-9d98aa4dd1) and ask him to get professional help.

Living your life consumed by hate is not healthy.

And after you tweet, [**please help me fund our advertising campaign and the next round of polls**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363786-852223-4859681-7323851ed5-9d98aa4dd1).

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. Trump Derangement Syndrome is very real and I am not making light of it. Nancy Pelosi had a TDS flare-up after the State of the Union Address. It leads people to embarrass themselves and is just plain unhealthy. [**While supporting my campaign, do Dean a favor and ask him to get professional help**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363786-852223-4859681-7323851ed5-9d98aa4dd1).

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-363786-852223-84585d41bbe610b-9d98aa4dd1)

---

This is it, team.

Andrew’s been running for president for almost two years. We’ve been coming to New Hampshire the whole time, and we’ve seen our crowds grow like crazy. We know the support we have in this state, and we know what can happen if we beat expectations tomorrow.

Imagine the headlines when Andrew has a strong finish. It will turn the political world on its head, shock the media, and send the other candidates into a frenzy.

**[We can make that happen, but only with your help. Contribute $10 or more now.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25117?t=12&akid=7367%2E377263%2EL2aF-9)**

Let’s do this,

Zach Graumann
Campaign Manager
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/25117?t=13&akid=7367%2E377263%2EL2aF-9)

body:
Minnesota is one of the most important states in the 2020 election.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200208-amy?refcode=em200210-resend&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") **_Will you split a donation between Senator Tina Smith's re-election campaign and my campaign for president?
[Let's win big in 2020 >>](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200208-amy?refcode=em200210-resend&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10")_** Hi -- Minnesota is one of the most important states in the 2020 election. Here's why:

1\. Donald Trump came within 1.5 points of winning Minnesota in 2016 and if he wins the state in 2020, he will likely secure a second term.

2\. My friend Tina Smith is up for re-election, Mitch McConnell's billionaire donor network has made her a top target and **Donald Trump has handpicked her GOP opponent.** If they defeat her it's very unlikely Democrats can flip the Senate.

Tina and I are out there every day taking on America's biggest challenges and bringing people together around the issues that matter to families.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Democrats made promises. President Trump delivered.
body:
“Democrats talk a big game about raising living standards for the ‘little man,’” Adam Brandon writes. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ed794944bf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • February 10, 2020
---
| | |
# **Democrats made promises. President Trump delivered.**

**“Democrats talk a big game** about raising living standards for the ‘little man,’” [Adam Brandon](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2e06df2cad&e=3ee4985eea) writes. “But the Trump administration is getting it done.”

**On school choice** , criminal justice reform, record-low minority unemployment, and more, Democrats have promised progress in disenfranchised urban communities for generations. The left’s actual policies, however, have only made matters worse.

**🎬** [**WATCH: In the land of opportunity, no American should be left behind**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a79d504a1e&e=3ee4985eea)

**Under President Trump,** real change is happening. The booming jobs market has brought African-American and Hispanic-American unemployment to historic lows. Wage gains are boosting pay for low-income workers more than white-collar ones.

**Education and workforce development** opportunities are expanding, too. “Our black colleges have been struggling for a long time, a bunch of them have gone under. [President Trump] threw a lifeline to them in real life in his budget,” [CNN’s Van Jones](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3f5e551e41&e=3ee4985eea) said.

**The President’s historic** 2017 tax cuts are also playing a major role in rebuilding our cities. In Charlotte on Friday, the President announced Opportunity Now—a nationwide effort to build on these successes and connect community leaders, workers, employers, and faith leaders across urban centers. “We are not interested in business as usual. We are not interested in continuing yesterday’s failures,” the President said.

“**We want to disrupt** what’s broken.”

[Tony Rankins: Opportunity Zones helped me, and they’ll help countless others.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9ab682013b&e=3ee4985eea)

**GET THE FACTS** : [The American Dream is back, no matter your ZIP code! ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d003faca3a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **NEW today: A responsible budget for a strong America**

**President Trump** unveiled his budget proposal for the 2021 fiscal year today, which combines responsible cuts to long-term government spending with common-sense investments in America’s working class.

**The highlights **include proposed funding increases for the core functions of the U.S. government—Veterans Affairs, NASA, and Homeland Security among them—along with sensible reductions to foreign aid and areas of redundancy across the Federal bureaucracy.

**Fiscal discipline** won’t come at the expense of hardworking or struggling Americans. “We’re not touching Medicare. We want to keep Medicare,” the President said today. “We’re not touching Social Security. We’re making our country stronger again.”

🚀 [President Trump proposes big boost for NASA to return to the Moon!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=60fdc5c4ab&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.foxnews.com/politics/trump-will-proposes-big")

**MORE: **[Trump’s budget will lift Rural America](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1d1c69b52b&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/washington-secrets/trumps-budget-boosts-to-wall-rural-communities-va-nasa-cuts-to-un-epa")

---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump attends the White House Business Session with Our Nation’s Governors **| February 10, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=78256db901&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5be6994c85&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6cab789ff5)
---

name: Amy Mesner, SaraGideon.com
subject: Last week, we set a goal of raising $100,000. Then $200,000. Then $300,000. And we're not stopping yet...
body:
Your donations made this possible.

Friends,
Last week, my team set a goal of raising $100,000 so we have the resources to defeat Susan Collins.
Well, we did it in just under 2 days, so we raised our goal to $150,000.
Then $200,000.
Then $300,000.
As of today, we have raised a jaw dropping $393,915 -- and we're not stopping yet:
**We are raising our goal to _ONE MILLION DOLLARS!_**
**[Will you help us get there by adding a $3 contribution now? This is a BIG goal, so it's also a big opportunity to demonstrate the strength of our grassroots movement.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802942/4bef7a87/6d2dbc5f/287fba92/3809462582/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMTAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200210-2-full")**
Friends, this is what a campaign _truly_ powered by the people looks like. **We 're not taking any money from corporate PACs, so your donations of $5 or $10 are what made this success possible -- and it's what's going to make the difference in November when we defeat Susan Collins.**
So thank you for that -- and let's keep it going!
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
